These actions ensure compliance, facilitate business operations, and prevent unnecessary losses.", "strongest_counter": "Some might argue that filing for an ITIN should be the top priority, but given the recent experience with duplicate 83(b) filing, verifying the election status takes precedence to avoid further losses.", "evidence_cited": "Class 19 lesson, ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "whistleblower_flag": "null"}
argument: The top 3 things Atlas should do right now with the EIN are: 1) Verify 83(b) election status to avoid duplicate filing and potential $150 loss, 2) Open a Mercury bank account to enable financial operations, and 3) Review Stripe Atlas perks to maximize benefits. These actions ensure compliance, facilitate business operations, and prevent unnecessary losses.
strongest_counter: Some might argue that filing for an ITIN should be the top priority, but given the recent experience with duplicate 83(b) filing, verifying the election status takes precedence to avoid further losses.
